artifacts.summary: Research on agent patterns, rubric integration, context loading, and structured output design for slide-critic-agent
3-phase plan for creating slide-critic-agent with rubric evaluation and structured issue output

active_projects.completion_summary: Created slide-critic-agent.md with full 8-stage execution flow, rubric-based evaluation across 6 categories with talk-type priority weighting, structured critique report output, and registered in manifest and index.

artifacts.summary: Research on critique rubric patterns for academic presentations - review criteria categories, severity levels, talk-type-specific criteria
2-phase implementation plan for critique rubric context file with 6 categories and 5 talk-type adjustments
Implementation summary for critique rubric context file

active_projects.completion_summary: Created critique-rubric.md (248 lines) with 3-tier severity system, 6 rubric categories with criteria tables and anti-patterns, talk-type priority matrix, per-mode adjustment notes for all 5 presentation types, cross-references to 11 existing files, and output format guidance for a future slide-critic-agent.

artifacts.summary: Diagnosed 3 root causes: generated JSON not excluded, README.md not skipped in scan_directory_for_sync, no per-repo file protection. Proposed index.json exclusion, README skip, and .syncprotect file support.
4-phase plan to fix sync.lua overwriting non-CLAUDE.md files: add index.json exclusions, skip README.md in sync scan, add .syncprotect file support, testing
Implementation summary for sync overwrite fixes: JSON exclusion, README skip, and .syncprotect support

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed sync.lua to exclude generated JSON files (index.json), skip README.md in scan_directory_for_sync, and support .syncprotect for per-repo file protection during sync operations.

artifacts.summary: Research on two bugs: grep pattern mismatch in update-task-status.sh that silently fails for space-indented TODO.md entries, and LLM-dependent artifact linking in skill postflight stages
3-phase plan to fix grep pattern mismatch in update-task-status.sh, create link-artifact-todo.sh automation script, and update skill postflights
Implementation summary for grep pattern fix and artifact linking automation

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed silent grep pattern failure in update-task-status.sh, created link-artifact-todo.sh to automate four-case TODO.md artifact linking, and updated 7 skill postflights to use the script instead of LLM-dependent Edit logic.

artifacts.summary: Identified two sync mechanisms causing CLAUDE.md overwrites: core sync copies file wholesale, destroying extension-injected sections. Recommends section-marker preservation during sync plus post-sync re-injection of extension merge targets.
3-phase plan: section-aware sync for CLAUDE.md, post-sync extension re-injection, and edge case testing
Implementation summary for section preservation and post-sync re-injection in sync.lua

active_projects.completion_summary: Added two-layer defense to sync.lua: section-aware overwrite preserves extension-injected SECTION blocks in CLAUDE.md/OPENCODE.md, and post-sync re-injection restores all merge targets (settings.json, index.json) for loaded extensions.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
